continuity_policy.final_router_state_after_sequence: no active pack currently routed; testing-doctrine numbered-08 path cleanup pack closed through Gate 256

old numbered GitHub or ChatGPT path still appears in repo authority

leaves.title: Rename and reconcile the numbered-08 testing doctrine path
leaves.objective: Promote testing/promotion doctrine into docs/08_TESTING_AND_PROMOTION.md, retire the older numbered-path confusion, and close the path cleanup truthfully after bounded proof.
owned_scope_units: rename the testing/promotion doctrine into the numbered 08 path
retire the old numbered GitHub or ChatGPT path from repo authority
update bounded tests and grep proof
forbidden_actions: Do not create a new numbered doctrine file for GitHub or ChatGPT interactions.
Do not widen into Docker or runbook cleanup beyond rename-forced path edits.
Do not run a blind whole-repo validation sweep.
validation_commands: rg -n "docs/TESTING_AND_PROMOTION\.md" AGENTS.md PLANS.md docs/01_NORMATIVE.md docs/06_REPO_PROCESS_AND_TRANCHE_LAW.md README.md docs/03_DOMAIN_MODEL.md docs/05_GUARDRAILS.md
definition_of_done: the numbered doctrine slot 08 points to the testing/promotion doctrine
the unnumbered testing/promotion path is retired from live authority surfaces
the old numbered GitHub or ChatGPT interactions path is retired from repo references
the router quartet records Gate 256 closed with no active pack routed
